requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for Latvia PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及拉脱维亚光伏逆变器要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及拉脫維亞光伏逆變器要求

summary.en: For Latvia solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. LVS is the national standards body aligned with CENELEC, SPRK oversees the energy sector, and AST controls the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Latvia has a continental climate with cold winters, and the electrical installation environment may require documentation of low-temperature performance, condensation protection, and appropriate IP ratings for the planned installation type (indoor vs. outdoor). Latvian-language documentation may be expected for certain project submissions.
summary.zh: 对于拉脱维亚太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。LVS是与CENELEC协调的国家标准机构，SPRK监管能源行业，AST控制实际并网接口，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。拉脱维亚属大陆性气候，冬季寒冷，电气安装环境可能要求记录低温性能、冷凝保护及适合计划安装类型（室内或室外）的防护等级。部分项目申报可能要求拉脱维亚语文件。
summary.zht: 對於拉脫維亞太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。LVS是與CENELEC協調的國家標準機構，SPRK監管能源行業，AST控制實際併網介面，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。拉脫維亞屬大陸性氣候，冬季寒冷，電氣安裝環境可能要求記錄低溫性能、冷凝保護及適合計劃安裝類型（室內或室外）的防護等級。部分項目申報可能要求拉脫維亞語文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVS standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
SPRK and AST project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for low-temperature performance, condensation protection, and appropriate IP ratings for Latvian continental climate installations

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Latvia projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Latvia project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and continental climate environmental exposure.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为拉脱维亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而拉脱维亚项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件和大陆气候环境暴露。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為拉脫維亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而拉脫維亞項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件和大陸氣候環境暴露。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Latvia IEC safety expectations. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Latvia configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for low-temperature performance, condensation, IP protection, and thermal derating. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Latvia can require updated safety documentation. Latvian-language manuals may be required for end-user project submissions.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足拉脱维亚IEC安全要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配拉脱维亚配置，记录保护配合和接地，并补充低温性能、冷凝、防护等级和热降额环境证据。针对拉脱维亚对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。面向最终用户的项目申报可能要求拉脱维亚语安装手册。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足拉脫維亞IEC安全要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配拉脫維亞配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並補充低溫性能、冷凝、防護等級和熱降額環境證據。針對拉脫維亞對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。面向最終用戶的項目申報可能要求拉脫維亞語安裝手冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where LVS, SPRK, AST, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires IEC 62109 safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Latvia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Latvia PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Latvia's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and document low-temperature, condensation, IP-protection, and thermal-derating controls appropriate for Latvian continental climate. Confirm current LVS, SPRK, AST, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 拉脱维亚光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配拉脱维亚230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并记录适合拉脱维亚大陆气候的低温、冷凝、防护等级和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行LVS、SPRK、AST及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 拉脫維亞光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配拉脫維亞230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並記錄適合拉脫維亞大陸氣候的低溫、冷凝、防護等級和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行LVS、SPRK、AST及項目業主安全要求。
